description: Generate a customer spending report from the Chinook database and export it to /home/ga/Documents/customer_spending.csv. The report must include exactly these columns in order: CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, Email, Country, and TotalSpending (rounded to 2 decimal places). Sort the results by TotalSpending in descending order. The exported CSV must include a header row, use a comma delimiter, and contain records for all 59 customers.
